gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.tooltip: Once a photo is uploaded to a slot, it cannot be deleted or replaced.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: In the future, Notices will be added here to display announcements such as:

profile.completeProfileMessage: Please complete your profile before uploading photos.

uploadDialog.title: Upload to Slot
uploadDialog.cropTitle: Crop your photo to square format
uploadDialog.cropImageTitle: Crop your photo to square format
uploadDialog.validationMessage: Your photo meets all requirements and is ready for submission!
uploadDialog.failedToCrop: Failed to crop photo. Please try again.
uploadDialog.failedToUploadImage: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
uploadDialog.unsupportedFileFormat: This file type is not supported. Please use PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, or HEIC.
uploadDialog.validationFailed: Photo validation failed. The photo must contain one clear, visible face to the camera.
uploadDialog.fileSizeError: File size ({fileSizeMB}MB) exceeds the maximum allowed size of {maxSizeMB}MB. Please choose a smaller photo.

genderMismatch.message: Gender mismatch. The person in the photo must be {gender}.
genderMismatch.generic: Gender mismatch. The person in the photo does not match the required gender.

previewPoster.title: Preview Certificate
previewPoster.downloadFailed: Download failed. Could not export certificate.
previewPoster.generateFailed: Could not generate certificate. Please try again.
